tweets.content: GDP growth above 4% in 2025. Foreign reserves at $45.4 billion - highest in 7 years. Stock market up 48%. The data doesn't lie. Tinubu's reforms are working. #RenewedHope
Inflation dropped from 24.23% in March to 14.45% by November 2025. That's real progress. When last did we see numbers move in the right direction like this? #RenewedHope
788,000 Nigerian students now have interest-free loans totaling ₦150 billion through NELFUND. Education made accessible. This is what reform looks like. #RenewedHope
The opposition criticizes everything but built nothing when they had the chance. Where were these economic gains when they were in power? Actions speak louder. #RenewedHope
FDI jumped from $90M to $720M in one quarter. Foreign investors see what the opposition refuses to see: Nigeria is finally getting its act together. #RenewedHope
₦58.18 trillion 2026 budget. Largest allocation? Defense and security (₦5.41T). Finally, a government that prioritizes protecting Nigerian lives. #RenewedHope
Exchange rate stability is improving. Naira strengthening. Trade surpluses maintained. These aren't talking points - these are official CBN numbers. #RenewedHope
The same people who ran this country into the ground for 16 years now want to lecture us about economic management. The audacity. #RenewedHope
2026 declared Year of Social Development and Families. 25 million women to be reached through empowerment programs. This is nation-building, not campaign promises. #RenewedHope
Nigerian Stock Exchange posted 48.12% gain in 2025, outperforming global peers. Your pension funds are growing. Your investments are growing. Reform works. #RenewedHope
Anti-terrorism operations with US cooperation. Grid synchronization with ECOWAS countries completed. Port modernization ongoing. Real infrastructure, real security. #RenewedHope
Tax harmonization agenda reducing multiple taxation burden. States are aligning. Finally, someone is tackling the chaos that's been choking businesses for decades. #RenewedHope
Critics said the reforms would destroy the economy. Instead: 4%+ GDP growth, falling inflation, rising reserves, surging investments. They were wrong. Again. #RenewedHope
Power sector debt reduced from ₦2.3 trillion to ₦147 billion. ₦700 billion saved for FG. This is the kind of financial discipline Nigeria has needed for years. #RenewedHope
Presidential CNG initiative cutting transport costs. 3MTT training program. Jubilee Fellows. LEEP. Real programs addressing real problems for real people. #RenewedHope
Moody's and Fitch - international rating agencies - are responding positively to Nigeria's reforms. But local opposition politicians know better than global experts? Sure. #RenewedHope
AKK Gas Pipeline. Coastal Highway. Sokoto-Badagry Expressway. Rail developments. Major infrastructure projects moving from blueprint to reality. #RenewedHope
The opposition had their time. They squandered it. Now they criticize the hard work being done to fix their mess. Nigerians see through this. #RenewedHope
Bank of Agriculture recapitalized. Agricultural mechanization expanded. Food security is national priority. Not just talk - actual budget allocations backing it up. #RenewedHope

Budget of Consolidation, Renewed Resilience and Shared Prosperity - not just a catchy title. ₦26.08 trillion for capital expenditure. Real money for real development. #RenewedHope
The opposition said subsidy removal would kill the economy. Reality: GDP up, inflation down, investments up, reserves up. Maybe they should stop predicting doom. #RenewedHope
State policing with proper safeguards. Decentralized security. Forest guards properly regulated. Finally addressing insecurity with structure, not just rhetoric. #RenewedHope

25M women through empowerment programs. Digital inclusion as foundational policy. Women at center of national planning. This is 21st century governance. #RenewedHope
